title: ukiff's ModPack
description: This project brings the best performance for low-mid end pc's, using this mod folder I average around 500 fps while recording in 240 FPS
body:
My mod folder - has alot of FPS optimizations with many more mods in order to enhance your PvP Combat experience.

Many high tiered players have used this modpack such as: ukiff ( Me - LT2 ), Cowarted ( HT2 ), Replaqing ( HT2 )

You will gain substantial FPS boost with many essential mods. For any questions message me on discord (ukiff)
